```python
# test_snake_to_camel.py

import pytest

from your_module import snake_to_camel


@pytest.mark.parametrize(
    ("input_value", "expected"),
    [
        # Happy path
        ("hello_world", "helloWorld"),
        ("my_long_variable", "myLongVariable"),
        ("snake_to_camel", "snakeToCamel"),

        # Already camel/plain string
        ("hello", "hello"),
        ("alreadyCamel", "alreadyCamel"),

        # Edge cases
        ("", ""),
        ("_hello", "Hello"),
        ("hello_", "hello"),
        ("hello__world", "helloWorld"),
        ("___", ""),
        ("a_b_c", "aBC"),

        # Numbers / mixed content
        ("version_2_id", "version2Id"),
        ("field_123_name", "field123Name"),

        # capitalize() lowercases remaining characters
        ("foo_BAR", "fooBar"),
        ("FOO_bar", "FOOBar"),
        ("foo_bAR_baz", "fooBarBaz"),
    ],
)
def test_snake_to_camel(input_value, expected):
    assert snake_to_camel(input_value) == expected


@pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "invalid_input",
    [
        None,
        123,
        12.5,
        [],
        {},
    ],
)
def test_snake_to_camel_invalid_non_string_inputs(invalid_input):
    with pytest.raises(AttributeError):
        snake_to_camel(invalid_input)


def test_snake_to_camel_bytes_input_raises_type_error():
    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
        snake_to_camel(b"hello_world")
```
